content.en:
The top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses such as the Red Girl Ancient Demon are too powerful, even if they are suppressed by the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield and can't exert much combat power, they are still not comparable to other top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

Even Ye Tian had to admit at this moment that the gap between himself and the strength of the Red Maiden Ancient Demon was too big.

It's not a notch at all!

As a result, Ye Tian did not participate in the snatching, he only watched the battle from a distance, and many ancient demon-level powerhouses did the same, and they didn't dare to participate at all.

Thundered!!!!!

The Red Maiden Ancient Demon and other powerhouses entered the ultimate space-time ancient treasure, penetrating the layers of ultimate space-time, and a roulette-like ultimate space-time ancient treasure emerged.

These powerhouses were eager to snatch this ultimate space-time ancient treasure, only to see a top ancient demon who was good at shuttling grabbed this ultimate space-time ancient treasure, but before he could take away this ultimate space-time ancient treasure, he was beaten to pieces by one attack after another, and only a wisp of ultimate particle breath escaped.

Although this top-notch ancient demon has not fallen, it will take a long time to recover.

And the battle of these powerhouses naturally affected this ultimate space-time ancient treasure, this ultimate space-time ancient treasure is obviously not very tough, and it is impossible to withstand the attacks of the top ancient demon-level powerhouses again and again.

After killing it for a long time, this ultimate space-time ancient treasure withstood 397 countless impacts, and finally shattered.

"Oh no, this ultimate space-time ancient treasure is shattered!"

The Red Maiden Ancient Demon Secret Path.

Suddenly.

An extremely powerful top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse grabbed an Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure and immediately fled, while the other powerhouses saw that they were only robbed of a small fragment, and it was impossible for them to hunt down and kill that top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse!

All of a sudden, there were more ancient demon-level powerhouses snatching the fragments of the ultimate space-time ancient treasure.

Whoa!!

The pieces were snatched by the Red Maiden Ancient Demon.

Ye Tian no longer hesitated, this was a good opportunity to snatch the Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure fragment, he didn't have high requirements, as long as he grabbed a little fragment.

Swish!

Ye Tian took a fancy to a piece of fragment and immediately went to grab it, and there was also a top ancient demon powerhouse who also took a fancy to this fragment and snatched it with Ye Tian.

Ye Tian cast the pinnacle ultimate arcane art of the armor of the Arrow, and also cast the third form of the Ten Thousand Laws form and the golden body of the Arrow, and then held a sword in the form of the arm of the Arrow and cast the sword light of the Arrow, slashing at the opponent.

With a single blow, the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse was blown away, leaving a trail of sword light on his body, almost penetrating his body.

This top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse was injured, and the injury was quite serious.

"How can this be ......"

This top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse was shocked, his strength was not weak, he was a strong among the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, and he also protected himself with the Ultimate Rule Domain, but he didn't expect to be pierced by the opponent's sword through the Ultimate Rule Domain, and the defense on his body was also penetrated.

If he was weaker, it would not be a heavy blow, but a beheading.

The other party is really too demonic, and his strength is much stronger than him.

Swish!

He quickly retreated, not daring to snatch this Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure Fragment with Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian snatched this fragment of the ultimate space-time ancient treasure.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian was not greedy at all, there were tens of thousands of ancient demon-level powerhouses involved in the robbery, and the fragments were at most a thousand, if he was greedy, he might be robbed of the fragments in his hands by a powerhouse like the Red Girl Ancient Demon.

So, he snatched a piece of shard.

I saw Ye Tian cast the golden light of Ah Luo Mu and quickly escaped, the speed was extremely fast, and some top ancient demon-level powerhouses also attacked Ye Tian, trying to intercept him, but he got rid of them.

......

"Finally escaped!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

In that case just now, not to mention that it was affiliated with the Aromu Fortress, even if it was an ancient demon-level powerhouse of the same tribe, they might all compete for it.

Because this Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure Fragment was too precious, he didn't return to the Arrowmu Fortress, but hid somewhere in the Huoxi Space-Time Battlefield, and then began to study this Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure Fragment.

"Such a terrifying fragment of the Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure is just a fragment, containing endless changes in the ultimate particles of space-time. "

He had been contemplating it for a while, and he had an idea in his heart, he was going to study the fourth form of the Ten Thousand Laws Form from the time and space form.

Moreover, he can also create the pinnacle ultimate arcane in terms of space-time particles.

......

Aromu Fortress.

At this time, the matter of the Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure Fragments was being discussed here, among which the Red Maiden Ancient Demon snatched a number of fragments, which was the focus of discussion.

Ye Tian didn't come back, and the Aromu Fortress didn't care.

And just like that, another long time passed.

Now.

Ye Tian's life pattern has undergone a metamorphosis, and the endless space-time ultimate particles are spreading.

Yes, by contemplating the Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure Fragment, he successfully transformed his own life pattern and integrated the mystery of the Ultimate Space-Time Particle.

Not only that, but he also created the fourth pinnacle-level ultimate arcane in a short period of time, the Body of Time and Space.

After casting the Body of Space, more than ninety percent of his attacks will be sent to other planes by his Body of Time and Space, so that he will not be able to do any damage.

In addition, the Body of Time can also increase his physical and temporal attacks.

And after he is attacked, he can also reverse his ultimate time and space, so as to avoid the injury, but this move can only be used occasionally, otherwise it will be counterattacked by the ultimate time and space, and the consequences will be more serious.

"Things should have settled down, and the Aromu Fortress is also informing me to go back, so let's go back!"

Ye Tian immediately returned to the Aromu Fortress.

After returning, some top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses visited him and wanted to borrow the Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure fragments, but he refused.

Of course, there were no consequences for him refusing, and those top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses didn't trouble him.

In fact, he didn't carry the Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure Fragment, and if the Arrow Mother turned his face and didn't recognize anyone, he would lose a copy body at most.

As it turned out, the Arrow Mother didn't covet his piece.

Therefore, he can rest assured that he can stay and cultivate in the Aromu Fortress.
